cancer_category.evidence: prostate biopsy showed adenocarcinoma, Gleason score 5+4=9

histology.evidence: prostate biopsy showed adenocarcinoma, Gleason score 5+4=9 (Grade Group 5), involving 11 of 12 cores, with extensive perineural invasion and comedonecrosis

diagnosis_date.evidence: At age 52, transrectal ultrasound-guided prostate biopsy showed adenocarcinoma

biomarker_result__7.evidence: next-generation sequencing (FoundationOne CDx) revealed SPOP F133V mutation

AJCC overall stage inferred from cT3bN1M0 as IIIC per AJCC 8th edition prostate criteria; not explicitly stated in text
